summary: Settings page to Subscribe to Settings page - Anonymous User
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Settings page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the navigation header
AND selects the "Browse Subscriptions" button on the Welcome page
AND selects one of the subscription package tiles on the Subscriptions page
AND selects the "Log In" button on the paywall page
AND enters an email address and password for an existing user
AND selects the "Log In" button on the Log In page
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Settings page
AND focus is assigned to the "Log Out" button
